ham.subject: Your Upcoming Flight Itinerary: Flight ABC123
ham.body:
Dear John Doe,

Thank you for choosing SkyHigh Airlines. Please find your flight itinerary details below:

• Flight Number: ABC123
• Date: 2026-05-10
• Departure: 08:45 AM from JFK International Airport (Terminal 4, Gate 12)
• Arrival: 11:30 AM at LAX (Terminal 2, Gate 8)
• Seat Assignment: 12A (Window)
• Baggage Allowance: 1 carry‑on + 1 checked bag (max 23 kg)
• Check‑in: Online check‑in opens 24 hours before departure. Please complete it at <URL>.
• Additional Services: In‑flight meals, Wi‑Fi purchase, lounge access.

We recommend arriving at the airport at least 2 hours before departure.

Should you have any questions or need to modify your itinerary, contact us at support@skyhigh.com or call 1‑800‑SKYHIGH.

Safe travels!

Best regards,
SkyHigh Airlines Team

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Payroll Discrepancy Correction
spam.body:
Dear John Doe,

This is an urgent notice from the Human Resources Department regarding a discrepancy in your recent payroll. Our records indicate that your salary for the month of April has not been processed correctly due to an administrative error.

To rectify this issue and ensure you receive the correct payment, please complete the following steps within 48 hours:

1. Verify your bank account details by logging into the employee portal at <URL> and confirming the routing number and account number.
2. Submit the attached payroll correction form (PDF) and return it to hr@ourcompany.com.
3. Reply to this email with the subject line "Payroll Correction – John Doe" to confirm receipt.

Failure to act within the specified timeframe may result in further delays and could impact your eligibility for upcoming bonuses. Your immediate cooperation is essential.

If you believe this email is in error, please contact the HR help desk at hrhelp@ourcompany.com or call 555‑123‑4567.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,

HR Compliance Officer
Human Resources Department
OurCompany Inc.
